title: Tropicraft [StationAPI]
description: A StationAPI port of the famous Tropicraft mod. Get ready for a tropical vacation of your lifetime!
body:
This is a port of the famous Tropicraft mod for StationAPI, it is not based on one exact version and contains some additions that I thought would fit in well.

_The project is still in development but im happy with its state enough to release it as I consider it to be in a playable state, just lacking some features that will come later and not affect the Overowrld worldgen much if at all_

Tropicraft adds tropical themed items, blocks, mobs and much more to Minecraft, and yes even Coconuts.

## Screenshots
![A beach chair under a palm on a sandy beach](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ec9e72544860c40f479ddfc0ef06e3615152584.jpeg)

![A Tropicreeper and a Tropiskeleton under a palm on a sandy beach](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db2d32e2e6365d6a43e2d79a76413f75baef62b7.jpeg)

## Features
* Easter Island Heads - Both Structures and Entities
* Iguanas & Scale Armor
* Frogs & Poisonous Frogs
* Tropicreepers & Tropiskeletons
* Beach Chairs [WIP]
* Bamboo & Bamboo Blocks
* 6 Records
* Sifting Mechanic with an API for other mods to add recipes
* Flower Patches
* Palms (Small, Larged and Curved) with Coconuts
* Pineapples
* Achievements
* Frog Block (We do NOT talk about this one)

## Planned Features
* The Tropics Dimension
* Monkeys
* Starfish
* Placeable Shells
* Corals
* Bamboo Spears
* Poison Blowgun
* Floats and Umbrellas
* Pineapple Nights and more celestial events
* Drink mixing
* Encyclopedia Tropics
